## Workspace boundary and out-of-workspace reluctance

<!-- aiscr:stop-anchor -->
**Entry scope (stub)**

- Canonical body: [`.cursor/rules/aiscr-workspace-boundary-safety.mdc`](.cursor/rules/aiscr-workspace-boundary-safety.mdc). Read that file when this rule's text is load-bearing for the current task.
- The rule applies in this assistant the same as it does in Cursor; the stub avoids duplicating the body in this surface to reduce shared optional closure.

Workspace-boundary safety — do not read/write outside workspace unless explicitly requested; when requested, state impacts and be reluctant. Exceptions: native app folders; relaxation for sibling repos (repos.toml registry). See [`.cursor/rules/aiscr-workspace-boundary-safety.mdc`](.cursor/rules/aiscr-workspace-boundary-safety.mdc) for the full rule body.
